title: rubus ctenodon
intro: Rubus ctenodon, also known as the bristly blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus ctenodon include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of Rubus ctenodon include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
